headline: Quiet Monday with no meetings, emails, or Slack activity — use the open calendar to drive progress on the generated evaluations design doc (AE-1079) and fix broken Salesforce/Snowflake integrations.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so dashboards are live before the work week ramps up
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the 'no ground truth' design doc for generated evaluations (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket, it's in To Do with no due date, and evals are a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR; calendar is empty today — best window to make real progress

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR page and prepare any inputs owed for the next TR cycle
must_make_progress.why: Last TR was 3/18; the next one is imminent. Evals are explicitly listed as a demo/deliverable area. Get ahead of status asks.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on the 'no ground truth' evaluation approach — they likely have prior art or constraints that should shape the design doc
Coordinate on evals tie-in with DeepRAG/BatchTransform validation patterns — both touch evaluation methodology

must_report_status.topic: Generated evaluations (no ground truth) design doc progress
must_report_status.note: Evals are listed in the Big Rock TR under demos/new content; have a shareable draft before the next bi-weekly

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake credentials are empty — all product telemetry and funnel metrics are inaccessible.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of it silently slipping. Set a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the Big Rock TR — monitor whether evals work has dependencies or overlap there.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-impacting activity captured in the last 16 hours; priority today is restoring observability (Salesforce + Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Product adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake integration; the generated evaluations design doc (AE-1079) is the primary adoption-driving work item to advance today.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday with a completely open calendar — best day to make real progress on the generated evaluations 'no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079), which ties directly to a key 26.4 deliverable. Top urgent items: (1) fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility on escalations and product metrics, and (2) get a solid draft of AE-1079 started before the next Big Rock bi-weekly TR. Zero meetings today.
